items.claim: John Garza is too inexperienced to defeat Farid Basharat.
items.quote: he's simply too inexperienced, I think, to beat a guy of Bosarat's caliber.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's lifestyle choices negatively impact his fighting ability.
items.quote: Conor has been pedaling booze, snorting coke, and banging hookers. He's toast.

items.claim: Conor McGregor must finish the fight early to win.
items.quote: I think it's got to be McGregor early or he's toast.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is more likely to look bad than Max Holloway due to his long absence and injury history.
items.quote: I have to say odds are in the favor of McGregor looking worse.
I have relatively high doubt in the McGregor gas tank.
